name: Japanese Hard Tack Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: VIVIEN SHEA (RWVK19A)
1. Sift together the sugar, flour, baking powder, and salt. Add eggs and mix well. Stir in dates and nuts.
2. Spread mixture thinly on a greased jelly roll pan measuring 13 inches by 17 inches. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes or until brown. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars. Dust with powdered sugar. Yield: approximately 30 cookies.
